title: Why Select Limo Service For Kids Celebrations & How To Prepare | Parental Guide
excerpt: Parents’ guide to selecting limo service for kids celebrations with confidence. Discover preparation advice, safety tips and what to expect during the ride.
contentHtml:
When it comes to celebrating your child’s special moments, the goal is to create memories that last a lifetime and give your child immense happiness. Traditional parties and celebrations are always fun, but why not take it up a notch? Opting for a limo service for your kids' celebrations adds an element of luxury, excitement, and novelty that they will never forget. Whether partying for a birthday or Kindergarten graduation, a limousine ride transforms any event into an extraordinary experience. It's not just a ride but an adventure that you feel when enjoying on wheels. Renting a kids' party limo service offers numerous perks and we are here to inform you all that. Also, you will get some notable tips to enhance your kids' party experience.





Benefits of Limo Service for Kids' Celebrations

A rental limo for your kid’s celebration offers a unique blend of fun, safety, and convenience. These are some notable godsends:

Unmatched Excitement and Fun

A limousine journey is an exciting experience for children. The novelty of traveling in a beautiful vehicle, packed with fancy interiors, mood lighting, refreshments, and top-of-the-line entertainment systems, can elevate any celebration to the level of a red-carpet event. Children get to have a unique experience that differs from traditional party settings, making the event more memorable.

Enhanced Safety

Safety is a primary consideration for every parent, and limousine services are well-equipped to provide a safe atmosphere for children. They come with safety measures such as seat belts, GPS tracking, and, in certain cases, kid seats, allowing parents to rest easy knowing their children are secure. Also, professional limousine chauffeurs are skilled and experienced, providing a safe ride. 

Space for Group Activities

Limousines are spacious and can comfortably accommodate a group of kids. This makes them perfect for group activities such as karaoke, watching movies, playing games, or even having a mini dance party. The ample space ensures that kids can enjoy themselves without feeling cramped, adding to the overall fun of the celebration.

Visiting Multiple Locations

Many Chicago limo service companies facilitate the addition of multiple stops while moving through the city. If you wish your kid and their friends to explore the different attractions, you just need to let the limo service know, and they do it accordingly. 

Door-to-Door Service

No more scrambling to find parking or worrying about designated drivers. A limo service provides convenient door-to-door transportation, ensuring a smooth and hassle-free experience for everyone involved.

How to Prepare for a Limo Service for Kids' Celebrations

You can follow these significant tips to make it a seamless and joyful trip for your child and their peers:-

Book in Advance

Limousines are especially popular for special occasions. Make your reservation well in advance, especially during peak seasons like prom or graduation.

Communicate Clearly

Discuss your specific needs with the limo service provider.  Inform them of the number of passengers, pick-up and drop-off locations, desired amenities, and any special requests you might have.

Set Ground Rules

Speak expectations with your child and their friends beforehand.  Establish clear guidelines regarding behavior and respect for the chauffeur and the limousine's interior.

Plan Activities

Having some fun activities planned for the limo ride can keep the kids entertained. Consider games, music playlists, or even a photo session with fun props.

Prepare Refreshments

Pack age-appropriate snacks and drinks for the ride.  This will help keep the kids happy and prevent them from getting hungry or thirsty during the celebration.

Fun Elements to Include in a Limo Service Kids' Celebration

We know the party limousine ride is fun in itself for the kids but you can enhance it with only a few little efforts. Try doing these things: 

Decorate the Limo

Hire the kid limo service provider that offers personalization options and ask them to add some festive decorations to the interior. Inform them of the party theme and request to add balloons, streamers, and their favorite music to create a party atmosphere.

Prepare a Playlist

To get the party started, create a playlist filled with their favorite songs. Let them take turns choosing the music and singing along.

Pack Party Favors

Small goodie bags filled with treats, toys, or glow sticks can be a fun surprise for the kids during the ride.

Play Games

Prepare some fun games that can be played inside the limousine.  Trivia questions, charades, or even a scavenger hunt can keep them entertained.

Photo Booth Fun

Pack some fun hats, boas, and other props for a makeshift photo booth inside the limo.  The kids will love capturing silly memories during the ride.

Final Thoughts

With a bit of planning and choosing a reliable kids' party bus in Chicago, you can surprise your kid this year. We at Avital Chicago Limousine And Party Bus are always there to serve you. Just let us know what’s on your mind for the celebration and what’s your budget restrictions and we will pick the best option for your prince or princess’s unforgettable time!

title: Busting Common Myths About Party Limos in Chicago
excerpt: Debunk common myths about party limos in Chicago with our informative guide. Get the facts and make informed decisions for your next event.
contentHtml:
Do you also have any kind of stereotypical perception about party limos and buses? These specially modified vehicles often draw our attention because of their glamor sparkling on the roads. However, no prior experience with such rides develops some misconceptions. If any of your big day is about to come, have a thought of considering this plan on limos in Chicago. Before making any judgement about their compatibility with your event, it is advisable to let us bust some common myths. Let’s figure out which of them are matching your thoughts.



Common Myths About Party Limos Busted

They are Highly Expensive Over Conventional Celebrations

Contrary to popular belief, renting a party limo in Chicago doesn't always break the bank. While perceived as a luxury service, the cost of a limousine service in Chicago can be comparable to other celebration options, especially when considering the value it adds. Shared among a group, the price per person can often be less than other transportation options. Moreover, limo services often include amenities that might otherwise be costly, such as entertainment systems, climate control, and plush interiors, making them a cost-effective choice for special occasions.

Only Local Short Trips Are Possible

Many assume that the services of limo rental in Chicago are only suitable for short, local journeys. However, this is a myth. Limousines and party buses are equipped for both short rides within the city and longer excursions to nearby attractions or even out-of-state trips. Whether it's a tour around Chicago's landmarks or a day trip to a neighboring city, private limo services offer a variety of packages tailored to accommodate different travel needs and durations.

Party Limos are not Easily Accessible to Book

Another misconception is the accessibility of booking a party limo. Today, with advances in technology, booking a limousine service in Chicago is as easy as ordering a pizza. Most services offer online booking options that display availability in real-time, along with details on different vehicle options and customizations. Additionally, customer service lines are typically available to help with any specific requests or questions, ensuring that booking a limo for your event is hassle-free.

Party Limos Are Only For Adult Celebrations

While private limo services are popular for adult events like bachelor or bachelorette parties, they are by no means limited to them. Limousines and party buses in Chicago cater to a wide range of events, including proms, graduations, birthdays of all ages, and even corporate events. These services often offer customizable themes and decorations to suit any occasion, proving that party limos can enhance any celebration, not just adult ones.

Limousines Lack Modern Amenities

Some might think that limos are outdated and not equipped with modern amenities. However, most limo rental services in Chicago have evolved, offering vehicles equipped with advanced technology like high-speed Wi-Fi, state-of-the-art sound systems, LED lighting, and even onboard bars. These features ensure that passengers can enjoy a contemporary, connected, and comfortable experience while traveling.

Only Large Groups Can Rent Limos

There's a misconception that you need a large group to make limo rental viable. While limos are ideal for groups, many limousine services in Chicago offer a range of vehicle sizes, including luxury sedans and town cars perfect for couples or small groups. These options provide the same luxury experience without the need for a crowd.

Limos Are Not Safe

Concerns about the safety of limo services can deter some from choosing this option. However, reputable private limo services in Chicago prioritize safety with professionally trained drivers, well-maintained vehicles, and comprehensive insurance. Additionally, these services are regulated by local laws that ensure high safety standards, debunking the myth that limos are less safe than other transport options.

Limos Can't Navigate Through Chicago's Busy Streets

There's a misconception that limos are too cumbersome for the bustling streets of Chicago, making navigation difficult. However, professional limo drivers are highly skilled and knowledgeable about the city's geography. They are adept at choosing the best routes to ensure timely and smooth travel, regardless of the size of the limo. This expertise makes limos a reliable choice for navigating through urban traffic.

Limos Offer No Personalized Service

Some people might believe that limo services are impersonal, offering a one-size-fits-all approach. However, limousine service in Chicago often includes highly personalized options. Clients can request specific music, decoration, and itinerary adjustments to suit their preferences, ensuring a tailored experience that reflects personal tastes and enhances the occasion.

Which of these thought were already on your mind? Is there anything else on your mind not clarified here? Talk to our professional consultants of party bus rental in Chicago to get relevant information.

title: A Parent's Guide to Planning a Quinceanera in Chicago with Limo Service
excerpt: Plan the perfect quinceañera in Chicago with our comprehensive guide. Learn how to integrate luxurious limo service into your celebration.
contentHtml:
Celebrations in mobility are becoming a new norm nowadays because of the same monotonous vibes from clubs and banquet halls. Party vehicles allow you to celebrate one special moment at multiple locations, which is a wonderful idea. To make this cozy and luxurious, stretch limos and modified limos are the top choices. Limos are long, lavishing and comfortable rides that have attracted everyone seeking an intimate celebration experience while traveling. On the other hand, modified party buses are known for their grandness as well as extended possibilities of mind-blowing features. When deciding whether to rent a luxury sedan limo or a modified bus, you must have several questions. We will try to clarify all the doubts with a comprehensive evaluation according to different requirements.





Benefits of Using a Party Bus for Quinceañera

Imagine your daughter and her court arriving in a luxurious party bus, like a modern-day royal procession. This spectacular arrival makes her feel special and wows the guests right from the beginning, setting a majestic tone for the festivities.

Mobile Ballroom for Her Court

Consider party bus service in Chicago as a mobile ballroom, where the Quinceañera and her damas and chambelanes can enjoy private moments together. Decked out with festive decorations that match her theme, the bus becomes a special space for them to practice their dances and share laughs before the formal event begins.

Cultural Touchpoints Tour

Utilize the mobility of a party bus for quinceanera to add a cultural tour to the day. In a city like Chicago, with its rich Latino heritage, you can include stops at culturally significant sites or a favorite family spot that holds meaning, enhancing the cultural significance of her coming-of-age celebration.

A Safe Celebration Hub

Parents can rest easy knowing that the transportation for their daughter and her friends is secure. The Chicago limo party bus provides a supervised, safe environment for young guests to enjoy themselves without the risks associated with driving between venues.

All-In-One Entertainment Venue

Equipped with modern entertainment systems, a sweet 16-party bus can keep the festive spirit high. Whether it’s playing her favorite music videos, showcasing a slideshow of her childhood photos, or featuring karaoke, the bus transforms into an all-in-one entertainment venue, keeping the celebratory spirit alive between the ceremony and the reception.

Ideas for Making Quinceanera Memories with a Party Bus

Thematic Decor and Personalization

Transform the party bus into a fairy tale setting or any theme your daughter loves. Decorate with balloons, streamers, and banners in her favorite colors. Personalize the space with custom signs that feature her name and the date, making the bus an extension of the celebration that feels exclusively hers.

Memory Lane Drive

Arrange a special route with the party bus that passes by significant locations in your daughter's life: her childhood home, her school, or other landmarks that hold special memories. At each spot, shares stories or displays photos from her childhood, creating a moving tribute to her journey to this milestone.

Video Diary Booth

Set up a video recording area in the party bus where guests can record personal messages or share memories and well-wishes. This video can be compiled later into a keepsake that she can treasure for years, capturing the heartfelt emotions of her closest family and friends.

Mobile Dance Party

Create a dance party atmosphere with a great sound system and disco lights. Have a playlist of her favorite songs ready, and perhaps include a few dance challenges or games to keep everyone entertained. This turns the Chicago limo bus ride into an exciting event itself, not just transit to the venue.

Crafting Station

Set up a small crafting area where guests can create keepsakes like friendship bracelets or personalized frames. These crafts can be themed around the Quinceañera, and guests can take them home or present them to the celebrant as personalized gifts.

Conclusion 

Inside a customized limo service in Chicago, you will have a vast scope for amenities inclusions and site navigation. So choose the luxury you want for quinceanera celebrations and create your own route around the city covering your favorite destinations. For top-notch facilities and flexible travel routes, you can always trust Avital Limousine. Tell us your guests and budget, we will find the most suitable rental vehicle for you.

title: Stretch Limo Vs. Modified Party Bus: Which is Right for You?
excerpt: Compare stretch limos & modified party buses to find the best fit for your event. Explore the pros and cons of each option with our expert guide.
contentHtml:
Celebrations in mobility are becoming a new norm nowadays because of the same monotonous vibes from clubs and banquet halls. Party vehicles allow you to celebrate one special moment at multiple locations, which is a wonderful idea. To make this cozy and luxurious, stretch limos and modified limos are the top choices. Limos are long, lavishing and comfortable rides that have attracted everyone seeking an intimate celebration experience while traveling. On the other hand, modified party buses are known for their grandness as well as extended possibilities of mind-blowing features. When deciding whether to rent a luxury sedan limo or a modified bus, you must have several questions. We will try to clarify all the doubts with a comprehensive evaluation according to different requirements.




Stretch Limo

A stretch limo is an iconic vehicle option known for its long body and luxurious interior. Traditionally associated with status and elegance, it offers a private and spacious environment for passengers. This makes it a popular choice for formal occasions and business events, where comfort and a polished appearance are prioritized. In the following sections, we'll explore the specific benefits that make stretch limos an ideal choice for various events.

Why You Should Go With a Stretch Limo Option?

Elegant Appearance

Stretch limos embody elegance with their sleek, elongated forms. They are perfect for formal occasions, offering a commanding presence that makes a sophisticated first impression. The polished finish and distinctive styling of these vehicles underscore a sense of prestige, making them a favored choice for those looking to add a touch of class to their event.

Intimate Setting

The interior of a stretch limo is designed for intimacy and luxury, making it ideal for small gatherings seeking privacy. The confined space promotes closer interactions among guests, enhanced by luxurious seating and exclusive amenities. This setting allows for meaningful conversations and a personal experience, far removed from the bustling atmosphere of larger venues.

Luxury Features

Inside a stretch limo, passengers enjoy an environment where every detail is crafted for comfort and elegance. From the fine leather upholstery to the precision-controlled climate settings and soft ambient lighting, these features create a refined atmosphere that caters to the discerning tastes of its occupants.

Discreet Service

Stretch limos are synonymous with discreet, professional service. The chauffeur not only drives but manages all aspects of the journey, including route planning and timely arrivals. This level of service ensures that guests can immerse themselves in the enjoyment of their event without concern for the practicalities of travel.

Ideal for Corporate Use

For business events, a stretch limo provides a setting that reflects professionalism and sophistication. It is an excellent choice for transporting executives or clients, offering a space conducive to private discussions or simply making a favorable impression. The limo's amenities support productivity, like Wi-Fi and charging stations, tailored for a corporate clientele.

Classic Tradition

Choosing to rent a stretch limo is often about honoring tradition and embracing a timeless sense of luxury. This vehicle is a staple in celebrations where history and heritage are valued, providing an elegant backdrop that enhances the significance of special occasions. Its classic appeal is especially suitable for weddings, anniversaries, and other milestone events.

Streamlined Amenities

The amenities in a stretch limo are carefully selected to enhance the experience without overwhelming the senses. Features such as refined sound systems for soft background music, adjustable lighting for ambiance, and privacy controls all contribute to a setting that prioritizes comfort and relaxation, distinguishing it from the more exuberant party bus environment.

Modified party buses

These vehicles redefine group travel by combining spacious interiors with state-of-the-art entertainment features. Perfect for social gatherings, bachelor or bachelorette parties, and large group celebrations, modified party buses offer an exhilarating environment where the party starts the moment you step on board. With custom modifications that cater to enjoyment and social interaction, these buses turn any trip into a memorable event.

What Makes Modified Party Buses Your Suitable Requirement

Vibrant Atmosphere

Modified party buses are designed to create a lively and engaging atmosphere. They feature vibrant LED lighting and spacious interiors that transform any ride into a mobile party. This setting is perfect for guests who enjoy energetic and communal celebrations, providing an environment that encourages dancing and social interaction.

Entertainment Options

These buses are equipped with state-of-the-art sound systems and multimedia facilities. Guests can enjoy music, videos, and even karaoke, making each journey an entertaining experience. The integration of technology ensures that the fun never stops, from start to finish.

Social Layout

The layout of a modified party bus is intentionally open, promoting guest interaction and movement. With amenities like onboard bars and lounge areas, these buses are ideal for mingling and celebrating in a shared space, making every moment more enjoyable and inclusive.

Professional Driving

Safety is a paramount concern, and each Party Bus comes with a professional driver. This ensures that all passengers can relax and engage in the festivities without worrying about navigation or traffic, making the journey stress-free and safe.

Customizable Experience

Modified party buses offer a customizable experience, allowing hosts to tailor the environment to their specific event needs, such as theme decorations and music playlists. This flexibility makes it easy to personalize celebrations and enhance guest satisfaction.

Ideal for Large Groups

These buses are specifically designed to accommodate larger groups comfortably, making them perfect for big events like birthdays, bachelor or bachelorette parties, and club outings. The ample space ensures that everyone can participate and enjoy the activities without feeling cramped.

Dynamic Features

Unlike the more reserved and elegant features of a stretch limo, modified party buses are equipped with dynamic amenities such as dance poles, disco balls, and sometimes even smoke machines. These features contribute to a festive and unforgettable atmosphere, perfect for guests looking to celebrate in a fun and unconventional way.

In choosing between a stretch limo and a modified party bus, consider your required specifications. Whether you seek the understated elegance of a limo or the dynamic, all-inclusive party atmosphere of a bus, both promise to elevate your celebration, making every journey as memorable as the destination itself. Avital’s Chicago party bus fleet meet custom limo and bus requirements with a wide array of amenity selection options. Talk to our booking representative if you still need assistance with deciding the suitable seating capacity and amenities.

title: Amazing Arrangement Ideas for a Birthday Party in a Limo!
excerpt: Discover creative and unforgettable arrangement ideas for hosting a birthday party in a limo. Elevate your celebration with top tips.
contentHtml:
It’s your birthday, and you must be thinking about how to make it an everlasting memory with loved ones. Well, this is a common struggle with birthday preparations. Undoubtedly, limo service for birthday is a great option instead of doing all the rituals in the same monotonous way. But which type of limo would be best suited is a matter of brainstorming before you finalize. The type of vehicle and its dedicated arrangements are crucial factors to keep in mind. We will suggest you both aspects in detail in this blog.





Which Type Of Limo Is Suitable For My Birthday Party?

When planning a birthday party that screams luxury and fun, choosing the right type of limousine can significantly enhance your experience. Here’s a guide to selecting the perfect limo for your celebration, depending on your style, party size, and desired amenities.

  • Traditional Stretch Limos

For those who prefer classic elegance, a traditional stretch limo service for birthday is a perfect choice. It comfortably accommodates about 6-10 people and often comes equipped with plush seating, mood lighting, and a high-quality sound system. This option is ideal for a more intimate gathering where the focus is on elegance and sophistication.

  • SUV Limousines

If you're looking for something a bit more robust with a modern twist, an SUV limo is the way to go. These are larger than your traditional limo and can hold anywhere from 10 to 20 guests. SUV limos are often equipped with all the bells and whistles of a stretch limo but provide more space and may offer more powerful sound systems and even onboard bars.

  • Party Buses

For those who want to throw a high-energy party on wheels, limo bus rentals are the top choice. You can accommodate large groups (up to 40 passengers) in a decked-out party bus with pole, dance floors, and disco lights. This is a great option if your birthday bash includes moving around the city, and hopping from one venue to another.

  • Classic and Vintage Limos

For a touch of nostalgia, consider renting a classic or vintage limo service for birthday. These beautifully maintained cars add a unique and memorable element to your celebration. They usually seat fewer people, making them perfect for smaller, more personal parties.

  • Convertible Limos

To add an unconventional twist, look into a convertible limo. Ideal for warmer climates, these limos offer all the luxury features with the added excitement of an open-top experience. This option is perfect for scenic drives or making a grand entrance at your party venue.

Arrangement Ideas for a Birthday Party in a Limo

1. Choose the Right Limo

The first step is to select the appropriate type of limousine based on the number of guests and your party theme. For a smaller, more refined gathering, a traditional stretch limo is perfect, while a birthday party bus is ideal for larger groups looking for a mobile party environment. Consider the amenities each type offers, such as sound systems, lighting, and seating arrangements, to enhance the overall experience.

2. Theme Decoration

Once you have chosen your limo, think about a theme that suits the birthday person's interests and decorate accordingly. For example, a 1920s Gatsby theme could include feather boas, pearls, and fedora hats scattered around the limo. LED lights, balloons, and banners can be added without damaging the vehicle's interior using temporary hooks and removable adhesives.

3. Plan Your Route

Part of the limo party fun is the ride itself. Plan a route that includes passing by scenic locations or landmarks that light up beautifully at night to add excitement as you move from one point to another. You might also include stops at the guest of honor's favorite spots, like a particular park, museum, or waterfront, where guests can take photos and enjoy the scenery.

4. Entertainment

A good sound system is crucial for a limo party. Create a playlist of the birthday person’s favorite songs or choose music that complements the theme. Some limos come equipped with flat screens, so you could play a video montage of memories or a favorite movie. Games like limo scavenger hunts or trivia related to the birthday person can also add a fun twist.

5. Catering and Refreshments

Coordinate with the limo service to arrange for catering that fits the tone and theme of your party. Options could range from elegant finger foods and champagne for a sophisticated night out to hearty appetizers and cocktails for a more laid-back vibe. Ensure there are non-alcoholic beverages available as well.

6. Special Touches

Personalized touches can make the party feel even more special. Customized party favors, a mini photo booth set up with a Polaroid camera, or a guest book for friends to write birthday messages are thoughtful additions that enhance the celebratory atmosphere.

7. Safety and Comfort

Lastly, ensure that all arrangements prioritize the safety and comfort of your guests. Discuss with the limo company about their policies, especially concerning capacity and alcohol consumption. Make sure there's a clear plan for the evening, including how guests will be transported home safely after the party.

Now, you are all set for your first birthday limo ride. According to the budget, number of guests, and amenities preference, you can decide on a limo service for birthday that remains in the memories of everyone forever!

title: Local Favorites: Limo Stops for Authentic Chicago
excerpt: Discover Chicago’s top local spots with our guide to favorite limo stops. Experience the city’s best restaurants, bars, and attractions with us.
contentHtml:
The limo ride in Chicago serves you the most luxurious experience and opportunity to discover "The Windy City." This experience includes exploration and celebration of Chicago's iconic culture, architectural marvels and other destinations for which Limo can be seen as the best choice as it takes care of any problem while keeping the party alive.

So, if you are planning to book or have already booked a limo service at Avital Limousine but aren't aware of the popular stops in Chicago, then this blog is the perfect guide for you.




Local Dining Gems: Culinary Delights

Alinea

The Michelin-starred restaurant Alinea is best known for its avant-garde cuisine that uses molecular gastronomy techniques. This influential restaurant is located in the Lincoln Park neighborhood, Chicago, where you can enjoy the following three experiences every night:

  • The kitchen table is where you can get the front-row seats, making it easy for you to witness some culinary action.
  • The Gallery is another experience where you are taken on a sensory journey by employing visual and artistic elements.
  • The salon offers you a laid-back and casual dining experience so you are able to enjoy an informal setting as well.

Girl & the Goat

The restaurant Girl & the Goat is a popular choice among locals and tourists for its blend of midwestern and Southeast Asian cuisine. This flagship restaurant offers its signature food, including Lamb skewers, pork belly, chicken wings, and sheep, with the best seasonal flavors and locally-rooted beer.

Duck Duck Goat

The modern Chinese restaurant, locally known as Duck Duck Goat is famous for its hand-pilled noodles, homemade dumplings, spring rolls, wontons, and other flavourful dishes. The provision for both private dining and organizing events is arranged in an elegant setting where you can enjoy the award-winning cuisine.

Lula Cafe

The vegetarian restaurant, Lula Cafe, is located in the Logan Square neighborhood, where a blend of Mediterranean and Middle Eastern flavors is offered. The tourists and locals appreciate this place a lot, especially for their signature dish called the Lula, which is a healthy bowl full of roasted vegetables, tahini sauce and grains. You can stop at this cafe and enjoy their organic food while on a limo tour destination.

Portillo's

Locals believe that Portillo's is the best place for trying classic hotdogs and Italian beef sandwiches. Here, you can enjoy your comfort food in a nostalgic and relaxing setting.

Cultural Hotspots: Art, History, and Entertainment

The happening lifestyle of Chicago is popular for its culture, historical landmarks, art, and museums. Besides being known for its advancement in performing arts, there are other top attractions in Chicago, as mentioned below:

Art

While exploring Chicago in a limo, you visit the following places:

  • The Art Institute of Chicago holds a collection of American art, impressionism, architecture, old masters, and post-impressionism that has been around for centuries. You can find the works of Saint John the Baptist, Claude Monet, and a collection of Thorne miniature rooms which is a witness of various historical period interiors.
  • The Museum of Contemporary Art presents the works of contemporary artists from various parts of the world. This museum features a collection of more than 24,000 objects and rotating exhibitions. This hub of creativity and innovations also organizes multiple community and educational programs.
  • The Picasso Sculpture, located in Daley Plaza, Chicago, is 50 feet tall and weighs more than 160 tons. Picasso dedicated and gifted this sculpture to the people of Chicago which now can be seen as a symbol of this city's commitment to public art.

Historical Landmarks

The history of Chicago is another thing that adds more value to this city and your journey, which is why you can explore the following historical landmarks:

  • Chicago History Museum has a great variety of artifacts, photographs, and documents that have been around since native American tribes. Here, you can encounter the collection of Carl Sandburg's Papers and Goodman's collection of Chicago Impressionist and Post-Impressionist Art while learning about the cultural shifts, pivotal moments, and influential figures.
  • Chicago Water Tower was built as a symbol of resilience, survival, and endurance. The reason was that this building survived the Great Chicago Fire of 1871, becoming this city's historical symbol.

Entertainment

Chicago has a lot to offer to everyone especially when it comes to entertainment. So, explore the following places for the best time:

  • Chicago Theatre District is the place where you can enjoy Broadway productions and local performances. Thus creating a vibrant and entertaining atmosphere for you.
  • Grant Park, also known as "Chicago's Front Yard," hosts many music festivals and events like the Grant Park Music Festival, The Taste of Chicago, and many more.

Breathtaking Views: Beautiful Landmarks

Millennium Park

One of the most beautiful landmarks is Millennium Park, which covers over 240 acres, including a large lake for fishing, bike lanes, and running tracks. This park features sculptures and installations, including the Bean Cloud Gate sculptures. The Jay Pritzker is an architectural marvel that you can easily locate while visiting this park.

Navy Pier

The best place to admire the city's beauty is Navy Pier where you can easily reach through a limo. you can enjoy the best view from this location while also appreciating the water slides, Ferris wheel, botanical garden, and other spots. Thus providing you with the best aerial view.

360 Chicago

The most breathtaking view of Lake Michigan and the Chicago skyline that you can encounter is through 360 Chicago. This smart city platform offers you a 360-degree view and real-time access to various city aspects like traffic updates, parking updates, etc.

Chicago Riverwalk

The riverwalk offers a marvelous view of the city's architecture, like the Chicago Board Of Trade Building and Willis Tower. The beautiful spot allows you to take in the urban landscape while observing the interplay between the busy city and the river.

Conclusion

Chicago is an international and cultural Hubspot for music, finance, art, and transportation. This city is waiting for you to explore the limo tour destination and historical landmarks through Chicago luxury transportation. title: The Journey of Limousines From Classic to Celebration Rentals
excerpt: Discover the evolution of limousines from classic luxury to modern celebration rentals. Explore trends and insights in the limo industry at Avital Chicago.
contentHtml:
Seating in a limo is no less than entering a royal aura where you feel privileged, like a member of the kingly family. After all, who is not fascinated by its grand impression, luxury seating, mood lighting, spacious interiors, and other magnificent amenities?

Being awe-struck by its lavishness, have you ever thought about how it used to look and feel when it first launched? Was the trend and craze about limo during its initial years and throughout its evolution the same as today?

Simply said, NO!! This luxury beast had quite a different beginning and throughout these years, it transformed immensely.

Curious to know how it all started and evolved? Just tighten your seat belt, and let's ride through Limo’s interesting life story!


Early Beginnings

The concept of separate driver and passenger cabins began in the 18th century in horse-driven carriages of elite class or royal families. The conservative high-class society did not consider it acceptable to share the same compartment with their driver. To keep up with this extra privacy and comfort for the passengers, this ideology was adopted by limousine manufacturers to develop chauffeur-driven luxury vehicles.

Following this conceptualization, In 1902, the first limousine was introduced. Even though it was an engine-operated model, only the passenger’s chamber was enclosed with an open driver’s compartment. To protect themselves from environmental factors, the chauffeurs used to wear cloaks.

Different configurations were popular at the time:

The Berline, featuring a fully enclosed driver side.

The other one was Brougham, having no roof for the driver portion.

The Stretch Limo


This phase transformed small Limos’ status into "big band buses."

Apart from the separated chambers, nothing really distinguished Limousines from other vehicles. Then in 1920, the strength concept came into the light. Initially, the musicians or similar large groups used the limos to comfortably travel to their different shows with their possessions. However, shortly after, the limousine became a ride for royal families, politicians, and other upper-class individuals.

The Late 20s

During the late 20s, Limousines stepped up to be more equipped, comfortable, secure, and enjoyable. At this time, amenities like televisions, bars, lighting, and more were introduced. This top-class ride experience made limousines a hype and a royal choice for wealthy people.


Soon top-tier security features and customization options were also introduced, and limousines became top choice. One of the well-known safety reliance examples was in 1972 when Ronald Reagan utilized a custom-made Lincoln Continental limousine as his presidential vehicle. This exquisite limo, with a dark blue exterior and chrome embellishments, reflected both elegance and security. Its spacious interior was designed to accommodate Reagan and his entourage comfortably. It incorporated top-of-the-line security features, including bullet-resistant glass, reinforced body panels, and a communication system to safeguard the future president.

The Current Advancements


Today’s limousines truly define “luxury, royalty, security, entertainment, comfort” - all together!

Electrification is in the air: As sustainability gains momentum, many Limos are being built in concern with eco-consciousness. These sleek rides offer a luxurious experience without the environmental guilt, thanks to quiet electric motors and zero emissions.

Tech on wheels: Today's limos are tech havens, having built-in Wi-Fi, high-definition entertainment systems, and even touch-screen controls for climate and lighting. Some even have karaoke machines for spontaneous bursts of fun!

Personalization takes center stage: Limousine companies are understanding that one size doesn't fit all. They're offering customizable experiences, allowing clients to choose everything from the type of vehicle and amenities to the music and refreshments.



Other amenities: Sound systems, Bars, gaming setups, VIP sections, refreshment areas, ambient lighting, climate control, and several other advanced technologies turned the limousines into a hub of enjoyment.

In fact, these lavish vehicles are transforming into mobile party venues, complete with dance floors, light shows, and even built-in bars. This trend is perfect for bachelor/bachelorette parties, birthday celebrations, or group outings that demand an unforgettable experience.

Ongoing Trends Associated With Limousine

Unlike in the past, the Limo’s usage is just limited to the elite class. Limos are easily accessible for everyone to rent. Even an average-earning person can easily enjoy the luxury of party bus rental in Chicago or other locations across the world.

Classic Celebrations

Weddings: The ultimate ride for the happy couple, their families, or the wedding party. Makes a grand entrance and ensures everyone arrives in style and comfort.

Proms and graduations: Still a rite of passage for many, limousines add a touch of luxury and shared fun to these milestone events.

Birthdays and anniversaries: Treat yourself or your loved ones to a VIP experience for a special occasion. Perfect for a night out on the town or a winery tour.

Bachelor/bachelorette parties: Hit the town with your crew in style and safety, without worrying about designated drivers.

Modern Twists

Wine tours and brewery crawls: Enjoy a worry-free day of tastings without worrying about driving between stops.

Sporting events and concerts: Skip the parking hassle and arrive in style for the big game or concert.

Corporate events and airport transfers: Make a statement for business clients or ensure a smooth and comfortable airport experience.

Photo shoots and music videos: Add a touch of glamour and sophistication to your creative projects.

Beyond the Stretch

Party buses: These spacious options offer more room for dancing, socializing, and onboard entertainment, perfect for larger groups.

Luxury vans: A sleeker and more affordable option for smaller groups, still offering a comfortable and stylish ride.

Specialty vehicles: Think vintage cars, SUVs, or even themed limousines for a truly unique experience.

Conclusion

Limousines, those iconic symbols of luxury and status, have come a long way since their horse-drawn beginnings. Their journey mirrors our evolving transportation needs and desires, transforming from private compartments for the elite to versatile celebration machines for all. Whether cruising to your wedding in a classic stretch or rocking out in a party bus with friends, limousines offer a unique blend of luxury, comfort, and unforgettable experiences.

If you also want to experience the royalty of this beast, consider Avital Chicago Limousine as your trusted Chicago limo service provider!

title: Party Limousine Etiquette Dos and Don'ts for Passengers
excerpt: Discover essential party limousine etiquette dos and don'ts for passengers. Navigate your limo experience with grace and style. To learn more continue reading!
contentHtml:
Celebrating a special occasion, be it a birthday, prom, or bachelorette, can be a super fun and exhilarating experience. However, there are certain essential etiquettes that you must be aware of while riding in lavish limos and sharing space with others.

From being respectful to your driver or chauffeur to making sure there is no damage to the property, there are certain guidelines and behaviors that are expected of passengers when riding in a limousine. Let's spend some time today exploring these limo driver etiquettes to help you make the most out of your limo party experience.



Dos for Limousine Etiquette

Reserve Your Luxury Ride in Advance

Luxury transportation companies want to know about your plans and requirements before your trip begins so that you can reserve your preferred vehicle. And get the ideal customized experience for you and your fellow travelers. Not planning beforehand may lead to additional charges, a shortage of seats for your guests, or other major inconveniences.

So, make sure to book your luxury transportation ahead of time so that you have a car ready and waiting for you when needed with everything you want.

Notify The Special Requests

After completing all your arrangements, if something changes, like additional drops or the number of passengers on the trip, notify the limo service. These would, otherwise, interfere with the chauffeur's schedule and can spoil your party experience. It is also your responsibility to inform your driver if you are running late, especially if you have booked an hourly trip, to avoid extra costs. This is crucial because when you are charged per hour, the clock begins ticking at your pick-up time. Make sure you thoroughly plan your schedule and let others and the driver know if anything changes.

Aim for On-Time Pick-Up and Drop-Off

While your driver will gladly wait for you, it is respectful to keep everyone else on the planned timetable. When the driver arrives at your pickup location, you and everyone else should be prepared to leave (it might even cost you some extra bucks).

If you are sending your child to the prom in a luxury limo, make sure to arrive on time to pick them up at the authorized departure point.

Understand How to Enter and Exit


If you have never taken a ride in a limo before, you may think that getting in and out is just like getting into any other car. However, there have been a number of unfortunate incidents in the past that indicate differently, so here is a step-by-step guide on the procedure:

• Let your driver open the door for you.

• Take the first available seat.

• Scoot or move along the seats until you get to the one you desire.

• And for getting out, make sure you wait for the driver to open the door.

Your chauffeur, however, will also guide you on how to enter and exit the limo, so there’s nothing to worry about.


Don'ts for Limousine Etiquette

Maintain Cleanliness:

It is your responsibility to return the limo to its same condition after the ride. So: -

  • Make sure all cans, bottles, and wrappers should all be empty and in the dustbins.
  • Do not throw food or other objects everywhere or at the other riders.
  • Ensure that your shoes are not lying on the chairs.
  • Everyone traveling in the limos must be mindful of sharp objects, such as belt buckles or heels, to prevent damage to the upholstery.

Avoiding Fighting or Getting Too Rowdy

It is quite understandable that the main objective of hiring a limo for a night out is typically to party, dance, and drink. However, if you do decide to consume alcohol, stay alert for excessive intoxication and rowdiness, and don't be an overly intoxicated rider that provokes a fight inside the limo. Also, you must strictly refrain from illegal activities and drugs, as they are not only prohibited by the law but can endanger everyone in the limousine.

Don't Push the Driver to Speed Up

Your limousine driver is a skilled professional who is required to follow all state-mandated traffic laws. So, bribing them or shouting at them to hurry up would be impolite and unprofessional. It would just spoil your fun and everyone else’s mood too.

Don't Disrespect Your Driver

Your limousine driver is supposed to take you from point A to point B without any issues. Therefore, they will do everything they can to make your trip as smooth as possible. But if there's an unexpected glitch in the plan, don't blame them.

Conclusion

A ride in a limo service in Chicago is an opportunity to create lasting memories, and observing proper etiquette is the key to a successful and enjoyable celebration. By following these guidelines, passengers contribute to a delightful experience, making the most out of their luxurious transportation for weddings, birthdays, proms, bachelor parties or any special occasion.

title: Exploring Chicago in Style: Limousine Tours and City Excursions
excerpt: Explore Chicago in style with our limousine tours! Discover the city's iconic landmarks and hidden gems with the Avital Chicago Limousine And Party Buses.
contentHtml:
Whether you are a first-time visitor to Chicago or a native, exploring the city's top attractions can easily span a day's worth of exciting excursions. To get the most out of your tour in a single day and same time, enjoy your onboarding experience, you need a limousine service in Chicago that takes you around the city while offering a luxury party experience and reliability.

With Chicago's best-rated limo company services on your side, you will enjoy safety, professionalism, class, and affordability in a smooth ride unlike any other. They offer rides to all of Chicago's leading tourist attractions. From the Magnificent Mile to the Art Institute of Chicago, the limo tour guarantees you will get the best memories of your life. Let's quickly enlist the must-visit attractions for you!



Must-Visit Chicago Landmarks

The Bean (Cloud Gate)

Mark this attraction as your first must-visited spot in Chicago when you head into Millennium Park! One of the popular attractions here is "The Bean ( Cloud Gate), a giant artwork. It's not just a regular ordinary sculpture; this piece of art itself reflects the city's green spaces around it.

The artist, Anish Kapoor, made it from various stainless-steel plates using computer tech. Inside, it's got two big metal rings holding it up.

When you personally see this, it looks more like a big shiny mirror that makes the city look different. People call it "The Bean" because, during construction, it looked kind of like a bean. Don't miss this Giant "The Bean" limousine excursion visit when you are around Millennium Park.

The Art Institute of Chicago

This place is like a big treasure chest filled with amazing art! Established in 1879, housing the most extensive collection of art from the Impressionist and Post-Impressionist eras outside the Louvre in Paris, the Art Institute of Chicago stands as a historical treasure. With over 300,000 art pieces, encompassing drawings, paintings, prints, sculptures, and more, this museum is a testament to artistic richness.

Imagine walking through this place and discovering masterpieces like "American Gothic" and "A Sunday on La Grande Jatte." So, if you are into art or want to see something awesome while vibing in a party-customized limo, visiting the Art Institute is a must. Take your time, explore the exhibits, and let the art transport you to different worlds right in the middle of Chicago!

Chicago Architecture Center

Nestled in the heart of Chicago and boasting an iconic silhouette of its own – the Chicago Architecture Center (CAC). More than a museum of static exhibits and ornate models (check out the colossal "Chicago City of Big Shoulders"), the CAC vibrantly educates and ignites a passion for the city through exhibits showcasing history and evolution alongside interactive learning spaces like touch screens and films.

But wait there – the CAC goes beyond its walls with insightful walking tours revealing hidden architectural wonders and diverse styles from Art Deco to the charmingly whimsical of the Prairies (think Louis Sullivan and Frank Lloyd Wright). It nurtures the next generation of architectural minds with engaging workshops and lectures for both kids and adults.

Pro Tip: Book the tickets online and check their website for special events and workshops to make your tour worth it.

The Magnificent Mile

Spanning from the Chicago River to Oak Street, The Magnificent Mile is a prominent thoroughfare renowned for its architectural grandeur and upscale commercial offerings. Beyond its role as a high-end shopping destination with flagship stores and designer boutiques, the Mile serves as a cultural epicenter. Home to esteemed institutions like the Museum of Contemporary Art, it offers diverse culinary experiences and hosts vibrant events.

Wrigley Field

All sports enthusiasts shouldn't miss visiting Wrigley Field, one of the country's oldest and most iconic baseball stadiums. Home to the Chicago Cubs, this historic venue visit in a limousine means a tour of sports history while vibing in your favorite sports theme songs throughout the way.

title: The Ultimate Guide to Choosing the Right Limousine for Your Event
excerpt: Discover the ultimate guide to selecting the perfect limousine for your event with expert tips and insights. Make your occasion unforgettable today with us!
contentHtml:
Choosing the right vehicle is as important as choosing the perfect outfit for any special occasion. For years, limousines have been considered a popular choice for traveling to parties and mega-events due to their aura of sophistication, comfort, and style. Its luxurious experience makes individuals feel like VIPs and helps them create a memorable and grand entrance at events. If you are also planning to make your event special by booking a limousine, it is essential to book a suitable vehicle that matches your requirements. In this blog, we'll assist you in choosing the perfect limousine for your special day by focusing on your needs and key factors like size, style, and amenities.



1. Selecting the Type of Limousine According to Your Event

• Sedan Limousine

The Sedan limos are a sophisticated and practical choice for traveling with a small number of people in style. These are often chosen for Corporate events, airport transfers, intimate celebrations, and executive travel where a more intimate setting is desired.

• Stretch Limousine

The Stretch Limousine is a classic symbol of luxury and opulence and can accommodate a larger group of passengers. The stretch limousine is popular for events like Weddings, proms, anniversary celebrations, red-carpet arrivals, wine tours, and exclusive nightlife experiences due to its spacious and classy interior. For wedding limos, these stretch limousines are the perfect and preferable choice.

• SUV Limousine

SUV limos offer a unique blend of headroom, spaciousness, and elegance. They are especially popular for Corporate outings, group transportation for events, concerts, and airport transfers where a larger capacity and commanding on-road presence is required.

• Party Bus Limo

Party bus limo stands out as a uniquely modified vehicle and is an embodiment of fun, luxury, and convenience. Ranging in sizes from minibusses to full luxury buses, these are often hired for celebratory events, bachelor party buses, large group celebrations, corporate parties, and other social events where a lively and dynamic atmosphere is desired.

2. Prioritize Amenities According to Your Event


Ensure that the amenities in the limo are compatible with the type of event you are hiring the vehicle for. Here are some of the popular features to look for:

• Lighting

Specify any particular lighting preferences to create the desired ambiance within the limousine. For example, if you want your travel to feel like a club party, ensure the limo you are looking upon is equipped with vibrant lighting to resemble that vibe.

• Entertainment Systems

Inquire about the availability of entertainment systems such as music, video, or even advanced multimedia setups and Wi-Fi. These are the vital features that every event needs to create a celebrated ambiance.


• Minibars

Will drinks and beverages be a part of your celebration in the party limo? If so, you can finalize a limo that features a minibar stocked with your preferred beverages, including soft drinks, water, juices, and alcoholic beverages.

• Pole Dance

If you wish to have a pole dance in your party bus for quinceaneras, make sure to discuss this with the limo service. Verify if the limousine you're interested in is equipped to accommodate such performances and if the service can arrange for a professional dancer.

• Video games

Look for special facilities like the availability of video games and LED screens if the party is being hosted for the kids. This will ensure that the kids’ entertainment is maximized.

• Laser Show

Consider the possibility of including a laser show in the limousine experience. This could amplify the overall entertainment value and create a memorable atmosphere.

3. Cost Considerations

It’s essential to keep the factor of budget in mind from the very beginning. Imagine you have selected a stunning limo that meets all your expectations but does not fit your budget. Different types of limos come with varying price points. Assess your needs and select a vehicle that suits your event without unnecessary extravagance, helping control costs. This helps narrow down options and prevents exceeding your financial limits.

Select a limo based on your budget, considering the event type and passenger capacity. You can also ask for customization options to keep the vehicle in your budget.

For example, if you are making a booking for an official meeting with a client, cutting down on amenities like music, lighting, beverages, and others can save you some bucks.

Pro tip: Opting for limo services during off-peak hours or on weekdays may come with lower rates compared to weekends or popular event days. This can result in significant cost savings.

Also, gain a clear understanding of the payment structure by discussing fees, charges, and any potential additional costs with the limo service. Inquire about deposit requirements, if any, to plan your budget effectively and avoid any surprises on the day of the event.

4. Event-Specific Customizable Interior

The interior of the limo party bus should be adaptable to different event themes, whether it's a birthday celebration, bachelor/bachelorette party, prom, corporate event, or wedding. This could include customizable lighting, seating arrangements, and decor that can be tailored to the specific event theme. The option to add or remove decor elements to suit different occasions adds a personalized touch to the experience.

For example, if it’s a kid's party, you might want to transform the interior into a Disneyland theme. Therefore, the interior elements must be flexible enough to be changed accordingly. Some limos might be more personalizable than others, and you must clearly understand the extent of this customization to suit your preferences.

5. Determine Your Number of guests

1. Determine the limousine's seating capacity to guarantee sufficient space for all your guests, ensuring a comfortable and enjoyable ride. A classic limousine may be perfect for a small group of people for a wedding. However, a standard stretch limo can usually accommodate 11 or more passengers, while longer limos can take 20 passengers.

2. Take into account any specific needs, such as the need for additional legroom or space for personal items, to suit the relaxation of each passenger.

3. Assess the luggage storage options within the limousine, especially when planning airport transfers or extended journeys. Adequate luggage space is necessary to accommodate belongings and ensure a hassle-free travel experience.

6. Privacy Considerations

When it comes to privacy, you must look for some features to ensure an intimate experience:

• Window Tinting: Limousine buses should have high-quality window tinting to provide privacy for passengers. This privacy helps reduce glare inside the vehicle.

• Soundproofing: A well-insulated and soundproofed interior can enhance privacy by reducing external noise and ensuring conversations inside the limo bus remain private.

• VIP Section: Look for limo buses that have privacy partitions with VIP areas for an added intimate experience during travel.

Final Words

This comprehensive guide highlights key considerations for you by prioritizing your needs and thoroughly evaluating the facilities provided by the limo service company, especially if you are looking for a limo service in Chicago. Now, you can select your limo accordingly, whether it's for a special event or a Prom Limo Rental, and ensure a smooth and memorable journey for your special day, making every moment elegant.

title: How to Become a Limo Driver in Chicago
excerpt: Discover the steps to kickstart your career as a limo driver in Chicago. From limousine licensing to skills, our guide covers everything you need to know.
contentHtml:
If you are looking how to be a limo driver in the city of Chicago you better note that the job goes beyond just picking up passengers and transporting them to their destination.

If you want to understand more about how to be a limousine driver, stay around to understand everything you need to know.

We will cover everything from how to get a limo license, limo license requirements, and CDL requirements to limousine chauffeur training.

Formal education is not required to become a limo driver but you certainly will need more than an ordinary driver’s license and knowledge testing to drive such a luxury limo vehicle in Chicago.

In this post, we will reveal how to become a professional Chicago Party Busor limo driver in Chicago and take a look at the state’s requirements so you can acquire a better understanding of what you’re getting into.

What Does a Limo Driver Do?

If you are still not aware, limousine vehicles are often hired to carry out a special occasion and a lot of alcohol is involved. It is highly likely for you to take part in a limousine driver training course to understand the position better.

Part of the professional limo driver’s duty is to keep the peace and prevent any trouble due to alcohol influence and understand the state’s (in our case, Illinois party bus laws) to be a good fit for the position.

Sometimes people get a little wild, and if the driver is not capable of settling things, it could be a hard time.

Being a limo driver can be exciting, but it is quite different from the party bus, considering that there could be actors, business executives, and singers in your basket, and regardless of the conversation going around, as a limo driver you should always act professionally and strive for an excellent customer experience.

Local Chicago party bus companies provide a single vehicle or a combination of vehicles so you might be responsible for more than one car.

Another responsibility of a limo driver is to drive around to different destinations, sometimes not predetermined.

In that regard, GPS is not always enough and you should have a good orientation around Chicago streets.

Before providing you with the limousine license requirements let’s illustrate better all possible limousine driver duties, we have prepared a list:

  • Drive around Chicago, meeting different destinations
  • Collect payments
  • Help client with luggage or wheelchairs
  • Maintain the vehicle
  • Follow safety procedures (Covid-19 safety measures)
  • Informing passengers of local attractions
  • Keep records of miles traveled

Upon hiring you will be provided with the Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS), which is a list of alerts that all limo drivers should be aware of including lousy weather conditions, high traffic environments, and more.

Knowing all that, let’s see how to get a limo license?

What do You Need to Be a Limo Driver?

If you are still wondering what do limo drivers make, keep reading to reveal everything. One of the greatest requirements to become a limousine driver is to be a communicative persona.

During your working hours, you might meet many different people from celebrities and artists to musicians and athletes. If you can’t communicate with your passengers and spark conversations contributing to a pleasant environment you might not be a good fit for the job.

Additionally, you should be used to driving vehicles with a gross, regardless of your limo license. If you are not a reliable driver and you know it, you should not apply for a limousine driver as you might carry responsibility for more than 20 people.

Upon hiring you will be provided with a limo driver training period in which you will have to pass medical examiners and tests to identify all required skills and duties on a different type of vehicle.

This way it will be unveiled if you are suitable for the position or not and it will also help you understand the job better, so if you are confident there nothing wrong to apply and give it your best shot.

Do Limo Drivers Need a Special License?

If you are wondering do limo drivers need a special license, here we will cover it all, taking CDL license Chicago Il, for example.

As we already mentioned, formal education is not required to become a professional limo driver, but you have to be a holder of a license for limo such as chauffeur licenses or commercial driver’s incense (CDL).

Feel free to Google “how to get my CDL license in Illinois and you shall discover everything you need to know. For the ones that are self-employed, they need a general business license and state-issued permits as well as a chauffeur license Illinois.

If you are still not aware of how to get a chauffeur license in illinois, you need at least 18 years of age and a valid driver's license for at least 12 months, otherwise, you are not meeting the criteria.

Furthermore, you might need to pass an exam and vision screening if you intend to transport passengers in vehicles with a weight of 10, 000 pounds to 26,001 pounds.

We can conclude that the answer to the question “what license do I need to drive a limo?”, is different in every state, so make sure to understand the requirements better.

How Much do Limo Drivers Earn?

Having everything else in mind it is time to reveal how much limousine drivers make and how much do party bus drivers make, to provide you with a comparison to understand the difference.

The common salary for a limo driver is about $20 per hour, which depends on experience and performance.

In contrast, the party bus rentals drivers could earn more depending on the number of people they are transporting and the weight of the vehicle.

There are, however, tips which we should not underestimate because sometimes limo drivers carry famous celebrities in the back and the right attitude and friendly approach could earn you good tips.

In other words, salary is negotiable, depending on your duties, and experience so you will find out only after the interview.

Bottom Line:

We can conclude that it is not necessary to have passed truck driving schools to become a limo driver, but you certainly need licenses and general approval before you can sit on the driver’s seat in such a luxurious vehicle.

9 Nice Places to Visit in Chicago

Grant Park

Why not visit a large urban park spread over 1.29 km. This historical park has been around for over a century and contains several picturesque spots such as Millennium Park, the Museum Campus, Buckingham Fountain, etc.

Grant Park has Michigan Avenue to its west and Lake Michigan in the East. Plus, it contains several performance avenues for artworks, sporting events, and large annual festivals and events.

Museum of Science

Chicago’s Museum of Science and Industry is in Jackson Park. The museum used to be the former palace for Fine Arts back in 1893.

You can see over 2,000 exhibits in 75 major halls.

Chicago River

Chicago is famous for its river system, popularly known as the Chicago River, spread over 156 miles, i.e., 251 Km.

The best part is that the river runs through the city. Hence, you can enjoy a walk by the river right in the middle of the urban setup.

Cloud Gate

This public sculpture created by Sir Anish Kapoor is a centerpiece of AT&T’s building at Millennium Park.

You will find Cloud Gate between McCormick Tribune Plaza, Chase Promenade, and Ice Rink on top of Park Grill.

Willis Tower

You must see this giant high-rise 110 floors, 1450 foot skyscraper when you visit Chicago.

This building is really a marvel of modern architecture and surpassed the World Trade Center (WTC) in New York, becoming the tallest building in the world in 1973.

Shedd Aquarium

Fancy visiting an indoor public aquarium in the middle of Chicago city? Then head to Shedd Aquarium with your friends and family in a party bus.

Lake Geneva
